title: ActiveCampaign vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Mailgun?
faq.a: ActiveCampaign starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
